sourceOrigin: generated from the tracked Beastbound G13 starter-cub identity lock
faintSemanticRule: open spiral or unfocused eyes only; no X/cross, sleeping closed eye, smile or death symbol

temporalStaticReview.down: both views descend monotonically from hit/buckle through collapse to a stable reversible-KO hold; no intermediate stand-up
temporalStaticReview.revive: both views begin at the exact down hold and recover progressively to ready stance without a pose pop
temporalStaticReview.knockaway: both views retain ordered impact, lift/rotation, descent and landing trajectory
temporalStaticReview.attackSkillCounter: attack, skill and counter contacts are in authored chronological order with anticipation, contact/release and recovery

postProcessRepairs.required: open spiral/unfocused eye and reversible unconscious pose

continuityOverride.reason: revive begins from the exact reversible-KO hold without a pose pop
